Title: Street, George E.
Sources: mentioned, Saunders, Susanna Terrell. "Georgiana Goddard King (1871-1939): Educator and Pioneer in Medieval Spanish Art." in Women as Interpreters of the Visual Arts, 1820-1979. Sherman, Claire Richter and Holcomb, Adele M., eds. Westport, CT: Greenwood Press, 1981, pp. 210, 226. Brick and Marble in the Middle Ages: Notes of a Tour in the North of Italy. London: John Murray, 1855; and Seymour, Edward Roe. The Cathedral of Holy Trinity, Commonly called Christ Church Cathedral, Dublin. London: S. Sharpe and Co., 1882; and King, Georgiana, editor. George Edmund Street: Unpublished Notes and Reprinted Papers. New York: The Hispanic Society of America, 1916; Some Account of Gothic Architecture in Spain. London: J. Murray, 1865, 2nd ed., and King, Georgiana, editor, New York: E. P. Dutton & Co., 1914.
